description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a spacious open floor plan, visible through large windows on the front and side facades. The exterior walls are finished in a dark color, contrasting with the white window frames and doors. A prominent porch with decorative railings extends along one side, providing an inviting outdoor space. The roof is flat, giving the structure a modern, streamlined appearance. Multiple rooms are visible through the windows, including a living area, dining space, and bedrooms, all arranged for efficient use of space. The overall design emphasizes accessibility, natural light, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious porch with decorative railings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long facade with large windows and the full length of the porch.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and the open porch area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with additional windows and a clear view of the porch's depth.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the porch, back entrance, and the arrangement of interior rooms.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
